user.title: Configure Fotile Range Hood
user.description: Make sure OpenWrt resolves api.fotile.com to Home Assistant. After submitting, power-cycle the range hood and the integration will discover the device ID and serial number.

data.mqtt_host: MQTT Broker LAN IP (defaults to HA host IP)

progress.discover_device: Waiting for the range hood to request the local cloud. Power-cycle the range hood and keep this page open.

abort.cannot_start_discovery: Unable to start the local cloud. Check whether the port is already in use.
abort.discovery_timeout: No range hood was discovered. Check DNS hijacking and power-cycle the range hood.
